ALL of the following are surfaced in the transcript: (1) a committed swap-verification + multi-machine UX gap-audit document (file path + commit SHA shown); (2) a converged unifying spec in docs/specs/ tagged review-convergence (file path + commit SHA shown); (3) the official cross-session goal registered in a durable tracker (project/commitment ID shown); (4) at least one implementation PR from the spec merged on green CI (PR number + merge SHA shown), with the remaining spec items either also merged or explicitly enumerated in the committed spec as the build queue with tracked action items (IDs shown)
